evaluator: fresh independent full-epic Level 2 evaluator (after all slices merge)
approval_notes: Orchestrator-directed F005 Slice 2. Build ONE slice, open ONE PR, do NOT merge, do NOT flip any passes flag. F005 stays passes:false; a separate fresh-context full-epic Level 2 close-out owns the flip after all slices merge.

Builds on Slice 1 (merged 405264a): Cloudflare official extraction + config->DB sync + scan runner + migration 0007 Source.slug. Slice 2 introduces the FIRST sanctioned publication path (F004 deliberately withheld publication; F005 introduces it).

Owner-confirmed decisions carried in: Q3 the publication CONFIDENCE score is stored inside the existing OfferVersion.material_facts JSONB; NO confidence migration; Slice 2 needs NO migration at all. Q4 AUTO-PUBLISH high-confidence changes in-pipeline; uncertain OR contradictory evidence -> pending ReviewItem and NEVER auto-published.

Standing autonomy boundaries: may branch/implement/test/commit/push/open ONE PR; may NOT merge, flip any passes flag, add a Python/npm dependency, weaken any existing test/fixture/CHECK/trigger, touch trg_offer_version_immutable or the two 0006 separation triggers, or add an LLM-to-publication path.
objective: Deliver a genuinely-working, deterministic, GATED publication path end-to-end and offline that turns a Slice-1 official Cloudflare Candidate + Evidence into a classified, published Offer: (1) deterministic numeric RE-VALIDATION that re-derives quota numbers from the extracted evidence (identical input -> identical result; unparseable -> None, never a fabricated number); (2) a PUBLICATION GATE enforcing ALL of docs/ARCHITECTURE.md 'Publication gate' (official source, schema-complete, deterministic material numbers, reproducible fetch/extraction, evidence for material claims, no blocking contradiction, sufficient confidence >= threshold, freshness within policy) - any fail => NOT published; (3) a deterministic CONFIDENCE score plus completeness/freshness signals, the confidence stored in OfferVersion.material_facts JSONB (NO migration); (4) a PUBLISH action that, only when the gate passes, creates/attaches Service+Offer, APPENDS an immutable OfferVersion, writes Quota rows, links the official Evidence (sets evidence.offer_version_id to the new version), then CLASSIFIES Z0 via the existing classify_offer bridge and persists the zero_cost_class + reasons; (5) CHANGE semantics reusing F004 reconcile vocabulary - IDENTICAL re-publish is idempotent (NO new version), a material change appends a NEW OfferVersion + a PUBLISHED ChangeEvent, and UNCERTAIN or CONTRADICTORY evidence raises a pending ReviewItem and is NEVER auto-published/auto-resolved; (6) wiring the path into the Slice-1 runner (run_provider_scans publish flag + `--publish` CLI) so it is actually invocable. Deterministic + gated; no LLM path; 'unknown is better than guessed'.
scope: apps/api/app/publish/__init__.py (new package): export the public publication API (re-validation, confidence signals, gate, publisher orchestrator + result carriers).

apps/api/app/publish/revalidate.py (new): pure, deterministic re-derivation of quota numbers from extracted candidate fact text (e.g. '100,000/day' -> amount 100000 per 'day'; '10 ms' -> 10 'ms'; '1 build at a time' -> 1). Thousands separators stripped; a value that cannot be parsed to a number yields None (UNKNOWN) - never a guessed/fabricated number. Identical facts always re-derive an identical, order-stable RevalidationResult.

apps/api/app/publish/confidence.py (new): deterministic ConfidenceSignals (official, schema_complete, deterministic, reproducible, evidence_backed, no_contradiction, fresh, plus completeness and freshness ratios) and compute_confidence() producing a fixed-precision score in [0,1] from documented, weighted signals. Pure; identical signals -> identical score.

apps/api/app/publish/gate.py (new): evaluate_gate() applying ALL docs/ARCHITECTURE.md publication-gate conditions and Q4 routing: high-confidence official+evidence+reproducible+deterministic+no-contradiction+fresh+complete AND confidence >= automatic_threshold => publish; contradictory OR uncertain (official+evidence but sub-threshold / soft-fail) => review (ReviewItem); non-official or no-evidence (structural exclusion incl. community) => withhold. Any gate fail => NOT published.

apps/api/app/publish/publisher.py (new): publish_candidate()/publish_scan() orchestrators (caller owns transaction; flush not commit). On publish: upsert Service (by provider_id+canonical_name) and Offer, APPEND an immutable OfferVersion (version_number = prior max + 1) with a deterministic content_hash over the material facts, write Quota rows (metric/amount/unit/reset_period/exhaustion_behaviour), set the candidate's official Evidence.offer_version_id to the new version, call classify_offer and persist zero_cost_class onto Offer + OfferVersion and reasons/blocking_conditions/confidence/signals into OfferVersion.material_facts JSONB. Idempotent: identical material hash to the latest version => NO new version. Material change => new OfferVersion + a PUBLISHED ChangeEvent (previous_version_id->new_version_id, materiality from reconcile). Uncertain/contradictory => a pending ReviewItem (deduplicated by identity), NEVER a published version. Community/non-official => withheld, never an offer. Never UPDATEs/DELETEs an existing offer_version.

apps/api/app/ingest/adapters/html.py: add ONE column mapping to each Cloudflare profile - 'exhaustion behaviour' -> HtmlColumn('exhaustion_behaviour','text') - so the offer's evidence-backed exhaustion behaviour is captured (data-only registry change; no adapter code branch).

tests/fixtures/ingest/cloudflare/html/{cloudflare-workers-limits,cloudflare-pages-limits}/{source.html,expected.json}: add the evidence-backed exhaustion-behaviour column/fact. Workers Free: exceeding 100,000 requests/day -> requests rejected (Cloudflare Error 1027), no automatic billing -> 'request_rejected'. Pages Free: exceeding the monthly build cap -> further builds blocked -> 'deployment_blocked'. Both are SAFE_EXHAUSTION stop-types, so publication yields a genuine Z0_TRUE_FREE. Real official behaviour, captured verbatim - not a guess.

apps/api/app/ingest/runner.py: add an opt-in publish=False parameter to run_provider_scans (default preserves the Slice-1 no-publication invariant and the existing runner integration test) that, after scan+reconcile of all sources, runs the publish stage over each scan's official candidates inside a per-source SAVEPOINT; extend the CLI with a `--publish` flag. Per-source publish faults are isolated, never aborting the run.
apps/api/app/ingest/__init__.py and/or apps/api/app/publish exports: expose the new publication symbols; the runner imports the publisher.

tests/unit/test_publish_revalidate.py, test_publish_confidence.py, test_publish_gate.py, test_publish_change_semantics.py: deterministic re-validation (identical input -> identical output; unparseable -> None; thousands separators), confidence scoring determinism + monotonic signal effects, gate condition matrix + Q4 routing, and change-semantics classification without a DB where feasible.

tests/integration/test_publish_pipeline.py (live PG): prove (a) the gate publishes a high-confidence Cloudflare offer -> Offer+OfferVersion+Quota rows created, evidence.offer_version_id set, Z0 classified with reasons persisted; (b) re-publish identical -> NO new OfferVersion (idempotent); (c) a material change -> a new OfferVersion + a PUBLISHED ChangeEvent; (d) contradictory/uncertain evidence -> a pending ReviewItem and ZERO new published version; (e) raw-SQL offer_version UPDATE/DELETE still rejected (SQLSTATE 23001); (f) a community/non-official candidate cannot be published.

docs: document the publication path (re-validation + gate + confidence + publish/change semantics) in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md / docs/PROVIDER_ADAPTERS.md and note the evidence-backed Cloudflare exhaustion-behaviour fact; append an agent-state/progress.md handoff.
out_of_scope: Any database migration (Q3: confidence lives in OfferVersion.material_facts JSONB; Slice 2 needs no migration). If a hard blocker requiring a migration is discovered, STOP and report rather than inventing one.
Flipping F005 passes:true or editing any feature_list.json passes flag (reserved for the separate post-merge full-epic Level 2 close-out).
Any new Python or npm dependency; no pyproject/requirements*/package.json change (requirements-sync stays green; stdlib only).
Any LLM-to-publication path; publication is deterministic and gated. No user-controlled URLs; endpoints come from vetted config only.
Weakening OfferVersion immutability (trg_offer_version_immutable) or the two 0006 separation triggers; never UPDATE/DELETE an existing offer_version.
Publishing community/non-official data: community stays discovery_candidate quarantine only and can never reach Offer/OfferVersion/Quota/published evidence.
The public catalogue/browse UI, adviser, and API surfacing of confidence/history/completeness (F006 and later F005 slices).
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic re-validation: quota numbers are re-derived from the extracted evidence text deterministically (identical facts -> identical RevalidationResult); thousands separators are handled; a value that cannot be parsed to a number yields None and is never fabricated.

Publication gate enforces ALL conditions (official source, schema-complete, deterministic material numbers, reproducible facts+hash, evidence for material claims, no blocking contradiction, confidence >= automatic_threshold, freshness within policy). Any single failure => NOT published.
Confidence is a deterministic score in [0,1] computed from documented weighted signals and stored in OfferVersion.material_facts JSONB; no migration is added.

Publish action (gate passes): creates/attaches Service+Offer, APPENDS an immutable OfferVersion + Quota rows, sets the official Evidence.offer_version_id to the new version, classifies Z0 via classify_offer, and persists zero_cost_class + reasons; a high-confidence Cloudflare Workers/Pages offer classifies Z0_TRUE_FREE with reasons.
Idempotency: re-publishing identical material facts creates NO new OfferVersion (step-2 acceptance: repeat runs create no false changes).

Material change: a changed material fact appends a NEW OfferVersion (version_number+1) and a PUBLISHED ChangeEvent linking the previous and new versions; the prior version is never mutated or deleted.
Uncertain or contradictory evidence: a pending ReviewItem is raised and NOTHING is auto-published or auto-resolved (zero new published OfferVersion).

Immutability + separation intact: raw-SQL UPDATE/DELETE of an offer_version is still rejected (SQLSTATE 23001); the two 0006 separation triggers survive; a community/non-official candidate can never be published.

Invocable: run_provider_scans(..., publish=True) and `python -m app.ingest.runner --publish` drive the publish stage; publish=False (default) preserves the Slice-1 no-publication invariant and its runner integration test.

Network seam only: publication reads persisted rows and re-derives numbers deterministically; no adapter/network egress is added; LiveFetcher stays disabled. No new dependency; requirements-sync stays green.
Regression green: scripts/test.ps1 and scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit pass offline (ruff lint+format, pytest, prettier, eslint, detect-secrets, pip-audit, npm audit, requirements-sync).
F005 remains passes:false; a fresh-context independent full-epic Level 2 evaluator (post all-slices merge) owns any status change.

integration_commands: Fresh live DB cycle on alternate host ports (POSTGRES_PORT=55432, API_PORT=8010, WEB_PORT=8090, DATABASE_URL=postgresql+psycopg://atlas:atlas@localhost:55432/atlas): docker compose down --volumes -> scripts/stack-up.ps1 --build (fresh DB applies 0001-0007) -> scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 -> pytest tests/integration with DATABASE_URL set -> docker compose down --volumes.

Prove on the LIVE DB: (a) high-confidence Cloudflare publish -> Offer+OfferVersion+Quota created, evidence.offer_version_id set, Z0 classified with reasons; (b) identical re-publish -> NO new OfferVersion; (c) material change -> new OfferVersion + published ChangeEvent; (d) contradictory/uncertain -> pending ReviewItem, ZERO new published version; (e) raw-SQL offer_version UPDATE/DELETE rejected (23001); (f) community/non-official cannot publish.

risks.data_migration: None: Slice 2 adds NO migration. Confidence and classification reasons are stored in the existing OfferVersion.material_facts JSONB (owner Q3). Migration head stays 0007; compare_metadata drift stays [].
risks.security_privacy: Publication is deterministic and gated; no LLM path, no user-controlled URLs, no network egress added, no secrets. Only OFFICIAL evidence can be published; community stays quarantined. Contradictions/uncertainty route to a human ReviewItem and are never auto-resolved.
risks.portability: Pure standard-library Python; no new dependency; amd64/arm64 unaffected.
risks.zero_cost_safety: No unsupported free claim: an offer is published Z0_TRUE_FREE only when the deterministic engine confirms every material condition is known and every quota exhaustion behaviour is a safe stop-type; the exhaustion behaviour is captured verbatim from official Cloudflare docs (Workers: requests rejected / Pages: deployment blocked - both no automatic billing). Unknown/unparseable numbers stay None; a failed gate withholds publication.
risks.immutability: OfferVersion is append-only: publication only INSERTs versions (version_number+1) and never UPDATE/DELETEs an existing offer_version; the offer-level zero_cost_class/last_verified_at (a mutable Offer, not offer_version) is refreshed to reflect the latest published version. trg_offer_version_immutable and the two 0006 separation triggers are untouched.
risks.regression: The publish stage is opt-in (publish=False default) so the Slice-1 runner test that asserts zero offer/offer_version/quota is preserved. Existing scan/reconcile/classify code is reused, not modified; the only edits to shared code are one additive column per Cloudflare profile and the additive publish flag on the runner.
risks.supply_chain: No new Python or npm dependency; requirements-sync stays green; stdlib only.

notes: Orchestrator directed F005 Slice 2, then STOP for a fresh-context full-epic Level 2 evaluation. Do NOT flip passes; do NOT merge; do NOT add a migration or a dependency; do NOT weaken immutability/separation; publication is deterministic + gated with no LLM path.
